chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 7805 of 2017 CP D 8337 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.32514/2017. 2. For hearing of main case. 07.02.2025 Mr. Ahmed Ali Hussain, advocate for the petitioners. Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate for the respondent. Mr. Iqbal M. Khurram, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Mujtaba Saheto, advocate files Vakalatnama and para-wise comments on behalf of the respondent 4, which are taken on record. Per learned counsel for the petitioner the final assessment is pending due to these petitions and the department may be directed to finalize the same vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. It is further sought that pending aforesaid, no coercive action be taken against the petitioner. Counsel for the respondent present and states that petitions may be disposed of as aforesaid. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place a copy hereof in the connected file. Judge ` Judge Khuhro/PA
